## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/shopinvader/odoo-shopinvader/issues/new?body=module:%20shopinvader_api_wishlist%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

You are welcome to contribute.

params.name:
Field(
        description="When used, a 'case insensitive like' operator is used "
        "to query the database."
    )

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.dependencies.ShopinvaderApiWishlistRouterHelper._prepare_update_value
documentation: On update, lines into the request are added to the existing lines

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.dependencies.ShopinvaderApiWishlistRouterHelper._add_items
documentation:
Add items to the wishlist

If a line refers to an existing one with the same product_id, the existing
one is updated

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.dependencies.ShopinvaderApiWishlistRouterHelper._update_items
documentation:
Update items to the wishlist

If a line refers to an existing one with the same product_id, the existing
one is updated

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.dependencies.ShopinvaderApiWishlistRouterHelper._update_lines
documentation:
Update items in the wishlist

If a line refers to an existing one with the same product_id, the existing
one is updated

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.dependencies.ShopinvaderApiWishlistRouterHelper._delete_items
documentation:
Delete items from the wishlist

If a line refers to an existing one with the same product_id, the existing
one is deleted

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.dependencies.ShopinvaderApiWishlistRouterHelper._move_items
documentation:
Move items from the wishlist to an other wishlist

If a line refers to an existing one with the same product_id, the existing
one is moved

functions.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.routers.wishlists.update
documentation:
This method is used to update a wishlist.

Pay attention that lines given in the request will be added to the existing
lines.

If you want to replace the lines, use the replace_items method.
If you want to delete the lines, use the delete_items method.
...

functions.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.routers.wishlists.add_item
documentation:
Add a new item to the wishlist

If rqst refers to an existing line with the same product_id, the existing
one is updated

functions.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.routers.wishlists.add_items
documentation:
Add items to the wishlist

If a line refers to an existing one with the same product_id, the existing
one is updated

functions.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.routers.wishlists.update_item
documentation:
Update an item in the wishlist

If no line is found with the same product_id, an error is raised

functions.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_api_wishlist.routers.wishlists.update_items
documentation:
Update items in the wishlist

If a line does not refer to an existing one with the same product_id, an error is raised
